name: Humatch
description: Identify human heavy V-genes, light V-genes, and well-paired antibody sequences with near-perfect accuracy.. Given an existing sequence, receive a jointly humanized antibody sequence in seconds steered toward a specific gene.
capabilities: Identify human heavy V-genes, light V-genes, and well-paired antibody sequences with near-perfect accuracy.
Given an existing sequence, receive a jointly humanized antibody sequence in seconds steered toward a specific gene

heavy_chain.description: Antibody heavy chain amino acid sequence

light_chain.description: Antibody light chain amino acid sequence

target_gene.description: Target V-gene to steer humanization toward a specific germline gene
